overall.description: A first-person journey through a dystopian industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring massive concrete highway overpasses, heavy yellow smog, and neon-lit billboards. The camera moves steadily through the hazy environment, transitioning from beneath dark underpasses to open intersections and industrial streets lined with warehouses.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with concrete support pillars

agents.ego_description: moving forward steadily through the covered highway underpass beneath massive concrete decks

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof over the roadway
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway structure
strip of cyan-colored neon lights mounted underneath the highway deck
metal chain-link fencing running along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beneath a massive highway overpass in a dark, enclosed concrete corridor. Cyan neon lights illuminate the wet asphalt road while thick support pillars line the path. The atmosphere is heavy with yellow smog filtering through the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with elevated ramps and billboards

events.description: exits the enclosed underpass into the open highway interchange area with visible sky

agents.ego_description: navigating the curved road beneath the complex highway ramps and overpasses

entered.detail: complex network of elevated highway ramps and curved overpasses
illuminated digital advertisement screen mounted on a concrete pillar
silhouetted palm trees visible through the haze in the background
tall street lamps with bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a complex highway interchange with multiple levels of concrete ramps. A digital billboard glows on the right while palm trees are visible through the yellow haze. The camera follows the curved road beneath the elevated structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with traffic control and warehouse buildings

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green allowing passage
turns right at the intersection onto the industrial street

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, waiting for the light, then turning right

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red then green
large industrial warehouse with red neon accent lighting on the roof
street sign visible at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an open intersection with a traffic light that changes from red to green. An industrial building with distinctive red neon lights stands on the right. The camera then turns right, leaving the highway interchange behind and entering a street lined with warehouses.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with warehouses, storage tanks, and sidewalk

events.description: pedestrian appears walking on the sidewalk ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the industrial street, approaching a pedestrian walking ahead

notable_agents.action: walking away from the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large dark industrial building with graffiti and illuminated signage
cylindrical industrial storage silos visible down the street
illuminated vending machines along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving along an industrial street lined with warehouses and storage tanks, the camera passes vending machines and streetlights. A pedestrian becomes visible walking ahead on the sidewalk. Large cylindrical storage silos dominate the view ahead as the camera continues through the hazy, neon-lit industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed concrete underpass into a sprawling, neon-lit industrial district shrouded in yellow smog. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass where cyan neon lights reflect off wet asphalt and thick support pillars line the path. As the camera exits the corridor, the scene opens into a complex highway interchange of curving concrete ramps and glowing digital billboards, with palm trees faintly visible through the haze. The view then shifts toward an open intersection where a traffic light turns green, prompting the camera to turn right past a red-neon industrial building and leave the interchange behind. Finally, the movement continues down a street lined with warehouses and vending machines, passing a lone pedestrian before heading toward towering cylindrical storage silos.
